title: designRequirements
description: The requirements a time-base part must comply with. Built on the PEAS designRequirementsBase mixin, with a deviceType discriminator that aligns with TBAS's top-level family discriminator, plus a small set of generic selection seeds (the AAS single-seed pattern: time-base selection filters on family + a couple of headline specs).

deviceType.description: Required time-base family. Aligns with TBAS's top-level family discriminator.

maximumFrequencyStability.description: Maximum acceptable frequency stability over temperature, dimensionless (1 ppm = 1e-6).

maximumRmsPhaseJitter.description: Maximum acceptable RMS phase jitter, in s.

supplyVoltage.description: Supply voltage available to the part, in V.

maximumCurrentConsumption.description: Maximum acceptable steady-state supply current, in A.
